quote: And today, we're bringing that functionality to systems based on Snapdragon's processors.
audit_note: Concrete Docker support for Snapdragon systems.

summary: Dracula Technologies committed to increasing its organic photovoltaic production capacity from more than 150 million square centimeters per year to 1.5 billion square centimeters per year starting next year. This is a concrete scale-up commitment for its indoor energy-harvesting OPV cells.
quote: Our company has already an installed production capacity of more than 150 million square cm per year and from next year on we will uh increase this capacity up to 1.5 billion square cm per year.

announcement: Enex Enos lithium-ion battery anode material mass production line
summary: Enex Technology announced a mass-production expansion plan for its Enos lithium-ion battery anode material, designed to replace graphite with safer, fast-charging material. The company targets a 100-ton-per-year line next year and longer-term scale-up to 10,000 tons.
quote: we we are targeted to set up a mass production line with 100 t a year this next year and uh increase up to 10,000 ton uh in 2030s and which can make help us to reach the annual revenue uh 20 uh million dollar uh 20 27 and uh raise the revenue of 400 million uh by 2030.

summary: EV Motors Japan highlighted its SiC inverter as the core technology behind its pure EV commercial vehicles, claiming lower battery consumption and longer battery life. The inverter underpins multiple EV products including buses, trucks, logistics vehicles, golf cars, and charging systems.
quote: With this inverter, even with the same battery with other type of vehicles, the battery consumption going to be 30% lower.

announcement: EV Motors Japan Series E fundraising
summary: EV Motors Japan stated it is currently in Series D and plans to open a Series E fundraising round next month. This is a concrete financing commitment tied to expansion of its EV commercial vehicle business.
quote: Currently we are on the serial D and next month we're going to open serial E.

announcement: Femtosense next-generation scalable edge AI device
summary: Femtosense announced a next-generation edge AI device planned for 2027, expanding beyond its current audio-focused chip into vision and broader on-device AI. The roadmap uses a tileable, scalable architecture to serve a wider range of embedded AI workloads.
quote: Uh and in 2027, we're launching our nextG device that would actually be much more scalable and can actually scale to serve vision and wider AI applications on device.

summary: Fiducia Edge introduced AI servers combining its zero-trust security/privacy technology with LLM downsizing to protect customer data and models while reducing deployment and GPU costs. This targets secure edge or customer-site AI deployments where data and model leakage are concerns.
quote: Therefore, we are uh we are uh sorry introducing our new AI servers which we have actually collaborate uh another company through the LM downsizing technology that's not only including our security but also help you to put your cost down or your GPU in the really significant sorry not going back help you to downsize your cost when you are like actually trying to training or deploy your AI

summary: Foxconn announced an AI factory/NCP AI data center in Taiwan using NVIDIA hardware, targeted at 100MW of power. The buildout starts with 20MW, followed by two 40MW phases, creating regional AI compute capacity for Foxconn, NVIDIA and Taiwan's ecosystem.
quote: And this AI data center is targeted to have 100 megawatt of power.
audit_note: Concrete AI data center power target.

summary: Genesis is Foxconn's AI manufacturing foundation using agents, token repositories, digital twins and robotics simulation to scale expert production knowledge across factories. It matters because Foxconn is positioning AI as a core layer of factory automation and process optimization.
quote: Our AI agents capture expert knowledge in areas like defect resolution and equipment tuning, handling 80% of the work, so humans can focus on the most complex 20%.

announcement: Foxconn platforms on NVIDIA AI software stack
summary: Foxconn committed to build its smart platforms and Foxbrain work on top of NVIDIA's AI software stack. This deepens Foxconn's dependence on NVIDIA software for digital twins, robotics, autonomous vehicles and AI infrastructure.
quote: So, we're going to build our platforms on top of the Nvidia AI software stack.
audit_note: Foxconn commitment to build on NVIDIA stack.

announcement: Foxconn smart EV platform and MIH reference design
summary: Foxconn said it will provide smart EV platforms with onboard and offboard applications, opening them to customers and as a reference design for MIH members. The platform is intended to reduce OEM development effort and accelerate time to market.
quote: And this uh platform we will open it up uh to our customers and also we plan to open it to make it a a a reference design for our MIH members.
audit_note: Concrete plan to open MIH reference design.

announcement: Taiwan robots community with Tech Orange
summary: Foxconn announced it will work with Tech Orange to create a Taiwan robotics community focused on industry innovation and growth. The commitment reflects Foxconn's view that generative AI plus robotics can fill labor gaps in developed economies.
quote: Fastcom will work with Tech Orange to create Taiwan's leading robots community to drive innovation in the in industry growth because of that GDP.

announcement: Mitsubishi adoption of Foxconn EV reference model
summary: Foxconn announced Mitsubishi as the first car OEM to use its EV reference model, tied to the prior 'Beauty and the Beast' SUV concept. The vehicle is expected to reach roads roughly a year after the keynote.
quote: You know Mitsubishi will be the very first you know uh car OEMs utilizing our reference models with that reference model.
audit_note: Quote supports Mitsubishi adopting Foxconn reference model.

summary: Foxconn expanded its prior 3+3 initiatives by adding three AI-powered smart platforms: smart manufacturing, smart EV and smart city. This frames AI factories as the compute backbone for Foxconn's next growth platforms.
quote: Now after the 3 plus three to make 3 + 3 plus three smart platforms becomes fastcon's new initiatives.

summary: GitHub Advanced Security is being unbundled for enterprise consumption into separate Advanced Secret Protection and Advanced Code Security SKUs. This gives enterprises more flexibility in buying secret protection, push protection, CodeQL code scanning, and Copilot Autofix capabilities.
quote: So I'm excited to announce that GitHub advanced security is now completely unbundled for enterprises to consume.
audit_note: Concrete GitHub Advanced Security unbundling announcement.

summary: GitHub committed to bringing its GitHub meetup program to Taipei. This is a concrete community-development initiative intended to expand local developer engagement in Taiwan.
quote: And we will be bringing some of these GitHub meetups over to your shows in Taipei soon.

summary: Hubster said it plans to close a few Taiwan project-based contracts this year and establish a branch next year. The commitment marks a planned Taipei/Taiwan expansion for its visual-inspection AI business.
quote: So our road map is a close two or three I mean a few project based contracts this year and I want to make the branch for next years.

announcement: Infineon-NVIDIA 800V DC data-center power architecture collaboration
summary: Infineon announced a collaboration with NVIDIA to develop next-generation data-center power architectures around an 800V DC backbone. The effort targets future AI racks scaling toward one megawatt and aims to improve efficiency, reliability, and copper usage through centralized power delivery.
quote: We actually have a collaboration with Nvidia and we will be looking at the next architectures to support the 80 800 volt DC architecture and of course we have the IT payload but the key thing is we're looking at a centralized ability to centralize the power delivery and the backup units.

summary: Infineon disclosed it is developing 12 kW three-phase power-supply solutions for future AI-rack architectures. The solutions are tied to higher-power server power supplies using silicon carbide and gallium nitride.
quote: And for your reference and a little bit of a teaser, we're also developing 12 kilowatt three-phase solutions for the next architectures.

summary: Innovates offers a computer-vision approach to collect manufacturing data without lengthy sensor installation. The pitch claims it can accelerate manufacturing digitalization by 100x by enabling one-day data collection.
quote: We accelerate manufacturing digitalization by 100 times by getting the data using computer vision.

announcement: Gaudi 3 instances on IBM Cloud general availability
summary: Intel announced general availability of Gaudi instances in IBM Cloud following collaboration with IBM. The public-cloud availability gives customers access to Gaudi 3 for inference workloads with stated cost-efficiency benefits.
quote: We launched Gaudi instances in IBM cloud in deep collaboration with IBM recently and uh we're excited to announce the availability the general availability of those instances.
audit_note: GA of Gaudi IBM Cloud instances stated

summary: Intel announced that its AI Assistant Builder is publicly available on GitHub and free to use. The tool is intended to help the ecosystem create locally deployable AI agents that run on PCs.
quote: Uh we are I'm I'm very excited to announce uh that the AI assistant builder is now publicly available.

announcement: Arc Pro B60 24GB and B50 16GB GPUs
summary: Intel formally launched Arc Pro B60 and B50 workstation GPUs based on Battlemage, with 24GB and 16GB memory configurations respectively. Intel positioned them for AI use cases as well as graphics, including multi-GPU scenarios.
quote: uh at Computex uh gives me great pleasure uh to participate uh in the formal launch of the ARC Pro B60 uh the 24 GB version of that uh uh GPU and the B50 uh which is the 16 GB version uh for workstation um and uh uh tailoring to the needs of AI use cases uh besides just being great graphics card.
audit_note: Formal Arc Pro B-series launch supported.

announcement: Panther Lake client CPU on Intel 18A
summary: Intel said Panther Lake, its next-generation client CPU, combines Lunar Lake efficiency with Arrow Lake performance and is built on Intel 18A. Production is stated to be on track later in 2025.
quote: Uh, Panath Lake combines the power efficiency of uh, Lunar Lake uh, with the performance of uh, Arrow Lake and is built on our latest uh, and greatest process generation 18A uh, which is on track for production uh, later this year.
audit_note: Panther Lake on 18A production timing stated.

summary: Intel said Gaudi 3 supports key GenAI frameworks and that its PyTorch bridge will be open sourced soon. This is intended to improve developer access to the Gaudi software stack.
quote: Uh we have PyTorch support in the form of a PyTorch bridge uh which will be open source soon.

summary: Intel committed to an Arc GPU offering for edge servers later in 2025. The product is part of Intel’s expanded Arc GPU portfolio for AI inference and edge deployments.
quote: uh later this year we will also have an ARC GPU for edge servers uh more details to come on that uh very soon uh but in in summary we are very very excited to bring these these expanded ARC GPU offerings uh uh to to our customer base.
audit_note: Concrete upcoming Intel Arc edge-server GPU

announcement: JM Tech 22nm and 12nm quantum-safe chip tapeouts
summary: JM Technology committed to advancing its post-quantum security chip roadmap with 22nm and 12nm tapeouts this year. The node migration is intended to support scaling of its hardware security IP and IC design services.
quote: We're focusing on 15 million fundraising in series A and achieving 1.5 million on ARR and continue advancing our tape roat with 22 nanometer in Q3, 12 nanometer in Q4 this year.

announcement: JM Tech USB dongle for quantum-safe secure identity
summary: JM Technology announced a USB dongle that packages its PUF-based, post-quantum cryptography secure identity solution for easier customer adoption. The product brings its quantum-safe security chip technology into a deployable hardware form factor.
quote: We launched our world first puffbased quantum safe secure identity chip at last year 2024 and this year we provide USB dongle uh for our customer to easily use our solutions.

announcement: Lee Pro Vision AR glasses optical engine
summary: Lee Pro Vision announced a compact optical engine for AR sport glasses integrating a transparent micro display and card-edge metal lens. The company is targeting small-batch production in 2026 and full-scale production in 2027.
quote: Now we are trying to to developing mod high resolution multiolor vision targeting small batch production in 2026 and the full scale in 2027.

announcement: ED Tool AI educational content platform
summary: ED Tool is an online AI platform for teachers and educational publishers to generate interactive digital lessons from text, PDFs, or textbook photos, with editing, LMS-style assignment, analytics, and multilingual support. The company also said the platform includes ready-made interactive resources for subjects such as math and science.

So we also include
on the platform
like 40 thousands of highly interactive
uh digital resources.

announcement: NVIDIA MVL 72 integrated AI rack power and cooling solution
summary: Lite-On showed an integrated rack solution to support NVIDIA MVL 72, combining power shelves, supercapacitor shelves, in-rack CDU cooling, and an MGX rack. It is positioned to help customers deploy AI racks faster and improve time to market and volume.
quote: This is our integrated solution to support Nvidia MVL 72.

summary: Lucon presented Deep Stereo, an immersive 3D audio format, along with the Deep Stereo Mixer plug-in for real-time rendering from a normal stereo source. The technology is aimed at use cases including podcasting, gaming, and integration into audio devices.

summary: Lunchbox presented an Android restaurant POS platform that integrates self-ordering kiosks, QR ordering, online stores, payments, AI recommendations, and future data/financing services. The product targets Asian restaurants seeking fewer software subscriptions, lower manpower needs, and revenue uplift.
quote: At the heart of it is Lunchbox, a smart point of sales solution, end-to-end restaurant solution.

announcement: GuluGulu AI positioning and HD mapping platform
summary: Microengineering Technology presented GuluGulu, an AI-driven platform for autonomous navigation, HD mapping, geospatial analytics, and spatial insights. Its headline capability is maintaining lane-level positioning accuracy even in difficult environments such as GNSS-denied underground settings.
quote: The first one we have actually one of the very unique AI positioning system that can maintain 30 cm accuracy all over everywhere and 30 cm is very critical because this is the requirement to keep a car within a lane.
audit_note: Quote supports AI positioning and 30 cm accuracy.

announcement: Millie Beam DHT power amplifier lineup
summary: Millie Beam announced a new DHT power amplifier product lineup for 5G infrastructure. The lineup supports broad FR1 and FR2 bands including N77, N78, and N79, with power coverage aimed at base-station applications.
quote: We have a new uh product lineup in DHT power amplifier that can be used in uh 5G infrastructures.
audit_note: New DHT power amplifier lineup stated.

summary: Millie Beam introduced Farpin, a millimeter-wave solution for high-power 5G infrastructure that includes a wideband beam former, radio transceiver, and antenna-in-package support. The solution is positioned to support FR1 and FR2 simultaneously and extend transmission distance for 5G and future 6G deployments.
quote: Uh we can um in our solution we can help you to uh increase your uh transmission from uh 100 meter to 500 meter and also we have a much higher power efficiency that can help you to uh increase the current efficiency from 3% to 10%.

announcement: Motive Power wireless charging solution for AMRs
summary: Motive Power introduced its wireless charging system for autonomous mobile robots to Taiwan, targeting automation needs in semiconductor and AI server manufacturing. The solution spans high-power charging for AMRs with compact receivers and rapid alignment-to-full-power charging.
quote: We have the widest power range that's supporting various varieties of autonomous mobile robust charging needs from 1.5 kilow all the way to 17 kilow.

summary: Music said it is launching an AI ticketing platform that uses AI agents to help users find concerts and arrange ticket purchasing schedules. The product extends the company’s AI entertainment focus beyond virtual concerts into ticketing automation.
quote: We are going to launch another AI ticketing platform.

summary: An AI-agent software product designed to automate routine business workflows such as sales targeting, estimate creation, database lookup, and document generation. The pitch positions it as a cross-industry AI coworker for factories, trading companies, restaurants, and other businesses.
quote: So there's completely different uh different workflow all built by one solution AI shine.

announcement: IC Taiwan Grand Challenge second batch winners
summary: NSTC unveiled the second batch of IC Taiwan Grand Challenge winners, selecting five international teams to join Taiwan’s IC startup ecosystem. The program is meant to attract global semiconductor-related talent and strengthen local ecosystem connections.
quote: The second batch of this challenge has selected five outstanding innovative technologies from a total of 154 technologies.

summary: A hydroponic container-farming module for growing premium Japanese wasabi faster and more reliably than traditional cultivation. The company says it began selling the module in Japan last year and is expanding internationally.
quote: Our 40ft wasabi cultivation module grows 1,800 muma wasabi ryome hydroponically in just one year.

summary: Nota AI stated it plans to file for an IPO this year after closing a Series C funding round last year. This is a concrete financing roadmap commitment from the AI optimization software company.

announcement: NSS Water WET nanopure water system
summary: NSS Water introduced its patented Water Enhancement Technology for semiconductor ultrapure water at point of use. The system is positioned to improve yield and sustainability by removing nanoscale contamination while reducing water consumption and operating cost.

summary: NVIDIA announced the Q3 upgrade of Grace Blackwell to GB300, keeping the same system architecture and footprint while increasing inference, memory, and networking. This matters because it extends Blackwell performance on the existing rack-scale platform cadence.

audit_note: GB300 upgrade timing is concrete NVIDIA roadmap detail.

summary: NVIDIA announced a joint effort with Foxconn, Taiwan, the Taiwanese government, and TSMC to build Taiwan’s first giant AI supercomputer for local AI infrastructure. This is a sovereign AI infrastructure commitment involving Taiwan’s core electronics ecosystem.
quote: And so today we're announcing that Foxcon, Taiwan, the Taiwanese government, Nvidia, TSMC, we're going to build the first giant AI supercomputer here for the AI infrastructure in the AI ecosystem of Taiwan.

summary: NVIDIA announced that Isaac GR00T N1.5, its robotics model for humanoid and generalist robot development, is now open sourced. The release provides pretrained models and tools to accelerate robotics developers.
quote: And so today we're announcing that Isaac Groot N1.5 is now open sourced and it's open to the world to use.
audit_note: GR00T N1.5 open sourcing explicitly announced

summary: Nvidia announced it will establish an overseas headquarters, the Nvidia Constellation, in Taipei. The commitment is positioned as strengthening Taipei’s AI ecosystem by giving startups closer access to global partners, capital, and infrastructure.
quote: Nvidia announced it will establish its overseas headquarters uh the Nvidia constellation right here in Taipei and this move this move uh really supercharges our innovation network giving startup direct access to world worldclass partners capital and infrastructure.

summary: NVIDIA announced NVLink Fusion, a platform for integrating custom CPUs, ASICs, and accelerators into NVIDIA’s scale-up AI infrastructure. It opens NVLink’s rack-scale ecosystem to semi-custom AI infrastructure designs.

summary: NVIDIA announced a new Taiwan office called NVIDIA Constellation, located at Beitou Shilin. The commitment reflects NVIDIA’s expanding engineering and partner footprint in Taiwan.

summary: NVIDIA announced GR00T Dreams, a Cosmos-based blueprint for generating synthetic robot trajectory data from limited human demonstrations. It addresses the robotics data bottleneck by turning prompts and demonstrations into training trajectories.
quote: Groot dreams is a blueprint built on Cosmos for large-scale synthetic trajectory data generation, a realtoreal workflow.

summary: Nvidia announced a video-search and summarization blueprint for building agentic AI over live cameras and offline video. It combines computer vision, multi-camera tracking, VLM/AOM and RAG to help manufacturers query, summarize and analyze video streams.
quote: So uh we just announcing so here in the computerext Nvidia we just announcing the video search and the summarization blueprint in short we call VSSS blueprint.

announcement: NVIDIA Omniverse Taiwan manufacturing digital twins
summary: NVIDIA said major Taiwan manufacturers are developing digital twins on NVIDIA Omniverse across manufacturing processes. This signals broad industrial adoption of Omniverse for factory planning, simulation, robot training, and industrial AI workflows.

audit_note: Quote supports Omniverse manufacturing digital-twin deployments

summary: NVIDIA released a new Metropolis blueprint that applies large language models, vision-language models, and retrieval-augmented systems to outside-in perception from cameras. It is intended to let factory, city, and manufacturing operators query video intelligence without needing AI expertise.
quote: So we released a new blueprint that leverages the power of large language models, vision language models, retrieval augmented gra systems, right?

summary: NVIDIA named initial NVLink Fusion ecosystem partners for ASIC, CPU, and EDA integration, including Astera Labs, Marvell, MediaTek, Fujitsu, Qualcomm, Cadence, and Synopsys. summary: IPHatch Taiwan is a startup incubation program that gives startups access to corporate patent portfolios from Panasonic and Nokia. The program matters because it uses IP as an investment and commercialization tool rather than only as a defensive asset.
quote: It is a 5-year incubation program that connects visionary entrepreneurs and worldclass patent portfolios from Panasonic and Nokia.

summary: Peace Future announced five patent portfolios for the Taiwan run across areas including digital transformation, AI, data analytics, healthcare, and sustainability. The portfolios include themes such as AI forecasting, autonomous vehicle control, digital privacy discovery, and social-surrounding detection.
quote: We have bring out five portfolios in total arranging in this different area of application that you may be able to use you know namely like digital transformation, AI, uh data analytics, healthcare, sustainability.
audit_note: Five IPHatch portfolios are explicitly described.

summary: Peace Future set the application deadline for the IPHatch Taiwan 2025 program. The stated timing gives startups a concrete window to apply before pitches planned for August or September.
quote: And finally the application deadline is on the 31st of July.

summary: Tech Hatch is a new program to provide licensable technologies, not just patents, to startups. It is positioned as a way to accelerate product and business-model development using advanced, usable corporate technology assets.

summary: Pulen announced an analog neuromorphic chip architecture that compiles digital neural-network models into an analog core for sensor-data processing. summary: Qualcomm introduced Context, an agentic AI model that runs entirely on-device using Snapdragon’s NPU. It uses local laptop files to understand a user’s work style and complete tasks while keeping data private on the device.
quote: Let me introduce you to Context, the world's first agentic AI model that runs entirely on device using Snapdragon's NPU.
audit_note: Concrete Qualcomm on-device AI model introduction.

announcement: Snapdragon X series design pipeline to about 100 designs next year
summary: Qualcomm said Snapdragon X series now has 85-plus launched or in-development designs and line of sight to roughly 100 designs next year. This is a concrete ecosystem-scale commitment for Snapdragon-based AI PCs.

audit_note: Concrete Snapdragon X design pipeline commitment.

announcement: L2 Pro Taiwan IP training platform
summary: Qualcomm launched L2 Pro Taiwan, a free online IP training platform for SMEs and startups. It is intended to help companies understand IP practice and develop IP strategies for Taiwan and global markets.

company: Small and Medium Enterprise and Startup Administration, Ministry of Economic Affairs
summary: GIH is a newly launched collaboration platform intended to connect Taiwan startups and incubation institutions with international partners for market entry, mentorship, funding, and business matching.
